hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Start by always guessing the first word from commonWords()

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Build a knowledge dictionary to track what you learn from each guess

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Track which letters are absent, which are present, and which positions are correct

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: For each position, track which letters are definitely NOT there

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Filter the word list based on your accumulated knowledge
